title: tellima triloba
intro: Tellima triloba, also known as fringe cup or western fringecup, is a flowering plant species native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tellima triloba include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Tellima triloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
